summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NumStore v2 digital products sales application. Backend APIs mostly functional (29/30 tests passed), frontend UI working well with successful payment integration, minor admin session persistence issue identified.

flaky_endpoints.symptoms: Returns 500 error when checking payment status for test session IDs
flaky_endpoints.workaround: Expected behavior in test mode - Stripe session doesn't exist on Stripe's side

integration_issues.issue: Admin session expires quickly, redirecting back to login page

design_issues.issue: Shows 'Produit non spécifié' error when accessing /access directly

passed_tests: Homepage loads with products and category filtering
Product page displays correctly with email input and purchase button
Payment session creation and Stripe redirect working
Access page code entry and resend functionality
Admin login with correct/incorrect password validation
Admin dashboard displays stats (Revenue: $0.00, Sales: 0, Products: 6)
Products API (get all, by category, specific product)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin session persistence issue - sessions expire too quickly causing redirects to login page. Consider implementing proper JWT token storage and refresh mechanism.
